prompt: Professional Latin American health supplement comparison advertisement. 1080x1080px portrait-style square. THIS IS A TWO-SECTION SPLIT DESIGN with a torn paper divider. REPLICATE THIS EXACT LAYOUT: TOP SECTION (top 44% of canvas): Solid deep matte black background (#080808), no gradients, no texture. Contains ONLY the headline text centered horizontally — Line 1 in bright yellow (#FFE600) ultra-heavy condensed italic uppercase bold sans-serif 'INMUNIDAD REAL,' approximately 80pt — Line 2 in pure white (#FFFFFF) ultra-heavy condensed uppercase bold sans-serif 'SIN IMITACIONES.' approximately 80pt. Both lines centered. No other elements in this zone. TORN PAPER DIVIDER: At exactly 44% vertical height, a realistic horizontal torn/ripped white paper edge spanning full canvas width, with jagged irregular tears pointing upward and downward, approximately 40px tall in the center, resembling physically ripped paper texture. The torn edge is white (#FFFFFF) on both the top and bottom side. CENTER PRODUCT ZONE (25% to 70% height, centered 30% to 70% width): COMPLETELY EMPTY — only show the black background above the tear and the yellow below. This zone is 100% reserved for product photo compositing. Do NOT place any object here. BOTTOM SECTION (from tear line to 100% height): Solid bright vibrant yellow (#FFE600) flat matte background. Contains two equal columns: LEFT COLUMN (5% to 48% width, from 52% to 95% height): Header text 'IMMUNOCAL' in ultra-heavy black condensed uppercase (~36pt). Below header: 4 horizontal rounded black rectangle rows (#0A0A0A), each full column width, ~9% height each, 2% gap between rows, containing — Row 1: solid dark navy blue circle with white checkmark icon on left, white bold text 'Cisteína Enlazada® patentada' — Row 2: same icon, white text '30+ estudios clínicos' — Row 3: same icon, white text 'Precursor de glutatión real' — Row 4: same icon, white text 'Fabricado en Canadá'. RIGHT COLUMN (52% to 95% width, from 52% to 95% height): Header text 'OTROS' in ultra-heavy black condensed uppercase (~36pt). Below header: 4 rows WITHOUT background boxes, each ~9% height, 2% gap, on plain yellow background — Row 1: red square X icon on left, black bold text '4+ gramos de azúcar' — Row 2: same icon, black text 'Sin estudios clínicos' — Row 3: same icon, black text 'Glutatión sintético oxidado' — Row 4: same icon, black text 'Sin control de calidad'. STYLE: Ultra high contrast, bold graphic design, clean geometric shapes, zero photography, zero gradients. Heavy condensed sans-serif typography throughout. Print-ready, sharp edges, perfectly legible text. Resembles premium sports/health supplement brand advertising from Animal, Ghost, or Optimum Nutrition.
negative_prompt: product images, supplement bottles, 3D product renders, any object in center zone, human models, photography, gradients, soft shadows, blurry text, watermarks, decorative flourishes, cursive fonts, pink colors, gentle or soft aesthetics, pastel backgrounds, low contrast, rounded friendly design, amateur layout

settings.style: ultra bold graphic design, comparison ad, sports supplement brand aesthetic
